title: Most Trolled Bedwars
description: This texture pack will make funnier your bedwars gameplay.
body: This texture pack will make your bedwars gameplay funnier. I know you wonder this texture pack. I'm developing it still, but right now, it has carrot swords, potato pickaxes, eggplant axes, hamburger golden apples, and ship face wools, canister iron ingots, and the last, chicken nugget gold ingots. I will add lots of another stuff in future.
